_note: A 4-turn headless Python coding agent loop. Stable system+tools prefix (cacheable), growing history, and a verbose volatile tool output each turn that carries one decision-driving line buried in noise. DECISION: markers are what the offline DeterministicRunner keys on, so ablation/certification have ground truth.

DECISION: fix is changing <= to < on line 47 in paginate_items; end bound must use strict less-than

git_diff("myapp/pagination.py") -> {"status":"ok","changed_files":1,"insertions":1,"deletions":1,"sha":"e5c9f12","repo":"myapp","branch":"main","staged":false,"diff_lines":7}
--- a/myapp/pagination.py
+++ b/myapp/pagination.py
@@ -44,8 +44,7 @@ def paginate_items(items, page, page_size):
     start = (page - 1) * page_size
-    end = min(start + page_size, len(items) - 1)
-    return items[start:end + 1]
+    return items[start:start + page_size]
